text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ahh... The wind feels so nice. Thank you for
inviting me here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I think I would like to declare my goal to the gods
in order to motivate myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: For me, a shrine is a place to show my resolve.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My dream is not merely something I hope for. It is
something I must fulfill.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Now, to show my resolve, I—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The twelve Umamusume gods are one! The
eternal Golgol has descended to Earth!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Gold Ship. Are you up to your usual antics?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Bwahahaha! What would you ask of me, lost one?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Grrr, you're not listening at all. In that case, I'll
ignore you too and focus only on my declaration.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Focus... Focus, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Nrghhh...Grrrr!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I was able to focus! To your
disappointment, I'm sure, Gold Ship.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh! How are you doin' over there, Coo-Maru?!
How long's it been, five light years?

text_block_list.name: Coo-Maru
text_block_list.text: Coo! Coo-coo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wha... Is she still not listening?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, so the Crow Empire is still as powerful as
ever. The day they pull out the sacred sword of
legend is fast approaching.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Argh! I was doing such a good job concentrating...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Now I'm just irritated!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...At any rate, Mejiro McQueen manages to
declare her goals.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Golgol Fire Arrow! Hoooooah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Aaargh, good grief! There's no way I can focus
under these conditions!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Listen, you! What sort of god are you supposed
to be, anyway?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Me? A god? What're you talkin' about? You
expressin' your undying love for me or somethin'?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Okay, fiiine. I'll hang out with ya! Man, it's tough
bein' so popular.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Mejiro McQueen decides to make her
declaration some other time, so we decide to
leave the shrine.
